headline: AT&T (T) Stock Faces A New Test After Russell Top 50 Exit
summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) has been removed from the Russell Top 50 Index as part of the latest index reconstitution. The change affects index-linked funds and mandates that track the Russell Top 50, with potential implications for holdings in AT&T. The removal may influence how institutional investors view AT&T within large cap U.S. equity allocations. AT&T is a major U.S. telecommunications company focused on wireless services, broadband, and media connectivity for consumers and businesses. Index...

headline: Verizon (VZ) Faces A New Rival If Starlink Launches U.S. Mobile Service
summary: SpaceX is reportedly weighing a Starlink retail mobile internet service in the U.S., which would compete directly with Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ), AT&T, and T-Mobile. Starlink has secured wireless spectrum licenses and may choose to operate its own retail offering rather than rely on existing carrier partnerships. This potential entry could matter most in rural and underserved areas, where Starlink's satellite network may appeal to customers with limited traditional coverage...

headline: AT&T (T) CFO Announces Retirement
summary: AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On June 17, 2026, AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) disclosed that Pascal Desroches announced his retirement as Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer on June 11, effective December 31, 2026. AT&T appointed Jennifer Biry as Deputy Chief Financial Officer […]
